CustomField.description: Enter availability text to appear on the development page of the AA Website for developments not administered by CGP&H.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter availability text to appear on the development page of the AA Website for developments not administered by CGP&H. website says: This location is not administered by CGP&H. If you want to join the waiting list, contact the provider directly:
CustomField.label: Not Admin by CGP&H Availability Text
